calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-25-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for April Funkhouser.

The Petition for Final Distribution was taken under submission. Mr. Vann is to submit a proposed order.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-25-2014 Continued To Apr-08-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-04-2014 Continued To Mar-25-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for April Funkhouser.

Mr. Vann stated that distribution is not coming along, that the situation has not changed since the last time he was in Court and that his Client refuses to communicate. Mr. Vann also stated that there is still the house in Fresno which is worth about $50,000.00, that his Client and the Sister are the heirs, and that the plan is to distribute the house jointly. Mr. Vann will discuss with the Sister the issue of her stepping in as Successor Executor. The Petition for Final Distribution was continued to March 25, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for the Court to reflect on solution.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-18-2014 Continued To Mar-04-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-04-2014 Continued To Feb-18-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Nov-26-2013 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Nov-12-2013 Continued To Nov-26-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for April Funkhouser.

Mr. Vann stated that he spoke with his Client early last week, that she said she had been ill and had not checked the mail for two weeks, that he went over and knocked on the door, and that there was no answer. Mr. Vann also stated that he can file the petition for final distribution without a verification and get a hearing date. Status on close of the estate was continued to November 26, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Loos. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Oct-22-2013 Continued To Nov-12-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for April Funkhouser.

Mr. Vann stated that he prepared the petition, and that he sent it to his Client but that she has not returned it. Status on close of the estate was continued to November 12, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Aug-13-2013 Continued To Oct-22-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for April Funkhouser.

Mr. Vann stated that his client finally came into his office and signed the Inventory, that it had been out, and that notice had been given to all of the agencies. The Court noted that the dismissal of the creditor's claim had been filed and then continued the matter to October 22, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on close of the Estate.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy R. Rosado. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Jul-09-2013 Continued To Aug-13-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for April Funkhouser.

Mr. Vann requested a continuance stating that the inventory was prepared and mailed over a month ago, that he has not received it back from his Client and that he may have to go over to her house to have her sign it. Mr. Vann also stated that he applied for an exemption with the Department of Health Services in May and that he is still waiting. Status on close of the Estate was continued to August 13, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Apr-30-2013 Continued To Jul-09-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:Dennis Vann for April Funkhouser.

Mr. Vann stated that there are two pending issues that are preventing close of the estate. The first issue is that the property in Fresno needs to be appraised. The second issue is that there is an outstanding Creditor's Claim from the Department of Health Services. Futhermore, Mr. Vann stated that both beneficiaries are receiving social security income and that he will be filing an exemption from the creditor's claim which will be submitted this week. Mr. Vann requested a continuance. Status on close of the estate was continued to July 09, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Nancy Bautista/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Jan-23-2013 Continued To Apr-30-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Nov-28-2012 Continued To Jan-23-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Sep-05-2012 Continued To Nov-28-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing
Off Calendar Feb-22-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for April Funkhouser.

Mr. Vann stated that he could not do anything in this Estate until the Grisby Estate closes and that he filed a Petition for Removal in the Grisby Estate. Today's status hearing/Notice of Intention to Terminate Administration of Estate on Court's Own Motion is off calendar. Status of close of the Estate was set for September 5, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy F. Andrade.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing
Off Calendar Jan-25-2012 Continued To Feb-22-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case number PES-07-289970 Estate of Martha Ann Grisby.

Amy Harrington appeared for Attorney Dennis Vann for April Funkhouser.

Ms. Harrington explained that the Heirs in the Porter matter are now willing to proceed with the probate petition and that Mr. Vann is going to petition to have someone else appointed in the Grisby matter. Both matters were continued to February 22, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing
Off Calendar Dec-13-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case number PES-08-289970 Estate of Martha Ann Grisby.

Appearances: Dennis Vann for April Funkhouser.

The status hearings were taken off calendar. The Court will send a Notice to Intention to Close the Estate's on the Court's Own Motion to April Funkhouser and Debra Ann Franklin.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy W. Weatherly.
